For each grain of truth in this adj
vertisement there are at least 10
grains of error or deception. Seed
incubation is not new discovery
1t has been practiced for some 15
wears. Ten years ago il was being
widely advertised in Germany by
German promoters who undertook
to establish the business of selling
nitrogent bacteria for inoculating
seed. Just now American promoters
are engaging in the same business
and they are endeaVoring to
strengthen their claims by erroneous
or misleading references to the work
of experiment stations and depart
ments of agriculture.
